# number / inline

The **number** type's `data-view.cell-editor` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.CellEditor({ match: "number", ... })` — a compact
`NumberEditor` (an autofocused numeric `Input` filling the cell) that parses the
edited text to `number | null` (empty ⇒ `null`, `NaN` ⇒ cancel) on Enter / blur
and cancels on Esc. Derived numeric types (e.g. `int`, `float`) reuse this
editor via the `extends`-chain fallback.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Number field type: data-view inline cell editor (compact numeric input editor).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.CellEditor` "number" → `NumberEditor`
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`, `primitives/ui-kit.Input`
